ksa_text: Knowledge of DataOps frameworks and operational data management, including data pipeline reliability, data quality monitoring, data freshness SLAs, and continuous operational improvement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data classification policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of data classification policies and procedures
Knowledge of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data security standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.433) to justify inclusion for the AI Innovation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.433 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Data Governance. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Data Governance is not sufficiently central to the AI Innovation Lead to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world AI Innovation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for AI Innovation Lead roles increasingly include Data Governance competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for AI Innovation Lead now include Data Governance competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Data Governance knowledge KSA is relevant to the AI Innovation Lead based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
